strategy: Never hit him with a damage spell under 3 pips; a cheap attack heals him 5,000 with Satyr. Only attack with 3+ pip spells.
Any spell under 3 pips (blades, cheap globals, cheap Feints) makes him Tower Shield himself. Expect shields and bring pierce or Shatter, or keep setup minimal.
Avoid Healing and Manipulation spells; they trigger a Wraith on the caster. Steal spells and cheap globals also just shield him.
Auras and Shadow spells do not trigger the cheat, so they are safe ways to buff.
Hit with Myth (+35% incoming); avoid Storm (35% resist). Land one big enchanted 3+ pip hit through his Tower Shield to drop the 6585 health.
cheatNotes: Any spell under 3 pips makes him Tower Shield himself, so cheap blades and Feints will shield him.
A damage spell under 3 pips is worse: he Satyrs himself for 5,000 health, then shields. Never poke him with cheap attacks.
X-pip spells only trigger this if they actually cost under 3 pips, so pump them to 3+.
A global under 3 pips makes him Tower Shield and drop a -5% Doom and Gloom, cutting your healing.
Casting a Heal or Manipulation spell triggers a Wraith on the caster. Avoid healing here.
Steal spells also make him Tower Shield himself (e.g. Ghoul).
Polymorph spells trigger an Orthrus on the caster.
Taco Toss and Stinky Salute make him Satyr himself and Wraith you.
A steal spell may also trigger a -90% Tower Shield on himself (Ghoul excepted), unconfirmed.
Manipulation spells that steal hanging effects do not trigger the cheat.
Cooldown does not trigger the cheat.
X-pip minion spells do not trigger it.
Auras, Shadow Self, Shadow Creature, and pet may-cast spells do not trigger it, safe ways to set up.
Charms and wards cast by your active Shadow Creatures do not trigger it either.
